title: Ward 1908
hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.
location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing

weeklyStructure.label: Discovery & Curiosity
weeklyStructure.objective: Validate the first anomaly, establish trust baselines, and seed investigative obsession.

weeklyStructure.label: Escalation & Unease
weeklyStructure.objective: Push contradictions, introduce manipulative pressure, and degrade certainty.

weeklyStructure.label: Danger & Direct Involvement
weeklyStructure.objective: Force personal risk, urgent tradeoffs, and irreversible consequences.

weeklyStructure.label: Resolution or Psychological Break
weeklyStructure.objective: Collapse competing truths into final judgement, compromise, or breakdown.

overarchingPlotArc.centralQuestion: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.
overarchingPlotArc.campaignPromise: A four-week investigation where evidence, conversation, and timing decisions shape the ending.

threads.title: Primary Investigation
threads.premise: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.
threads.objective: Establish an admissible chain-of-custody and identify the orchestrator.

threads.title: Peripheral Incident
threads.premise: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.
threads.objective: Determine whether the side event is collateral damage or intentional staging.

threads.title: Suppressed Truth
threads.premise: Institutional abuse cover-up sustained by staff
threads.objective: Recover suppressed records that reframe motive and victim selection.

threads.title: Manufactured Lead
threads.objective: Expose deliberate misdirection before it burns key evidence time.

threads.title: Psychological Pressure Arc
threads.premise: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.
threads.objective: Preserve judgement while antagonist personalization escalates.

branchAnchors.label: Restore names publicly vs protect descendants privately

deliveryModel.delayedResponsePolicy: Important interactions can hold for 1-6 hours to preserve world persistence and tension.

awarenessRules: NPCs may reference choices from previous day interactions.
Antagonist may mirror wording from player decisions under high pressure.
Unknown contact should feel observant but plausible, never supernatural omniscience.
